name: Grimhold Valley
description: A sheltered valley perfect for learning the basics of town defense. Natural chokepoints and abundant resources make this an ideal starting location.

spawnPoints.name: Western Pass
spawnPoints.description: Main enemy approach through the valley entrance

spawnPoints.name: Eastern Ridge
spawnPoints.description: Secondary approach from the mountain path

spawnPoints.name: Northern Cliffs
spawnPoints.description: Late-game flying enemies approach from here

tips: Block the western pass with walls and towers
Use the river as a natural barrier
Stone deposits near the cliffs provide upgrade materials
Forest patches offer renewable wood supply
